name: battleship-skill
tagline: Generate a playable Battleship web game with one tool call
description: Creates a complete two-player Battleship web game (index.html + style.css + game.js) in any local directory. Features a 10×10 grid, drag-and-drop ship placement with free repositioning, touch support for iOS and Android, privacy screens for passing the device between turns, and hit/miss/sunk visual feedback. No server, no install — open index.html in any browser to play.
author: Darrell-10

tools.name: create_battleship_game
tools.title: Create Battleship Game
tools.description: Creates a complete two-player Battleship web game in the specified output directory. Writes three files: index.html, style.css, and game.js. Open index.html in any modern browser on desktop or mobile to play immediately.
